top.name: The Fishery
top.rules_text: Create the Fishery on target tile (30HP). While it exists: all your constructs gain +2 to all stats. You may deploy constructs on any tile within 3 of the Fishery for free (1 per turn). Constructs within range regenerate 6HP per turn.

channel.name: The Fishery (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Free deploy is 2 per turn and range is 5

bottom.name: Kilvin's Lesson
bottom.rules_text: Permanently: your constructs no longer take self-damage from Overclock. All your Deploy spells cost 1 less. Constructs you control have +1 Range.

channel.name: Kilvin's Lesson (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also +2 damage to all constructs
